g.text: NOTES: All dims in mm. Fitting pockets: 9.8mm bore grips 9.31mm JG center body (0.25mm clearance/side). 15.10mm body ends protrude ~12mm each side of 4mm rear wall.
Release plate cavity 6mm deep x 63W x 51H behind fittings. Guide pins 3mm press-fit. Cam pivot 5mm. Front 4.0:1, Side/Top 2.5/2.0:1 (px:mm).
